infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Alchemize uses your photo library to set your profile photo and add images to your manifestation board.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Alchemize saves images to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Alchemize uses your camera to take profile photos and scan food items for calorie tracking.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Alchemize uses the microphone for affirmation audio recording features.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Alchemize reads your workout and activity data from Apple Health to enhance your fitness tracking experience.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Alchemize may write workout summaries to Apple Health to keep your fitness data in sync.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Alchemize syncs your appointments to your iPhone calendar so you never miss an important event.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: Alchemize syncs your appointments to your iPhone calendar so you never miss an important event.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Alchemize uses motion sensors to create an immersive parallax effect on the home screen.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Alchemize may use your location to provide relevant local context for your goals and appointments.

plugins.photosPermission: Alchemize uses your photo library to set your profile photo and add images to your manifestation board.

plugins.cameraPermission: Alchemize uses your camera to take profile photos and scan food items for calorie tracking.
